transcript: Um, hi folks. I'm Harsh, I'm the co-founder of MetEngine and I'm here to talk about Internet Capital Markets. Solana is the capital of Internet Capital Markets. We have over 500 trillion dollars worth of assets in this world and that on the screen you can see the graph of how much it is distributed and we have just been getting started. This is the amount of money which is made by market makers in retail LPing. Normally in the TradFi world, these fees are put behind ISDA licenses and it is a very close club of a few million dollars high net worthers. But on Solana, it is for the users. Users alone today have made 2.76 billion dollars in fees this year. And well, if because these fees are there to be made, these markets are there to be made, there aren't enough good analytic tools to help curate alpha because Solana produces one terabytes of data per single day. You need to pass through all that data and find those analytics. So, that's what we are doing. We are building the Axiom for LPing. Fastest real-time data analysis, we do everything within like 5 milliseconds, lowest transaction landing and yes. That's a demo video of like how it goes and you can have a customized heatmap, that's a Kaito mindshare heatmap of all the pools there are on Solana updated in real time. You can know what which are the best positions right now, you can know all the top market makers. You do not need licenses here, you just need to know how to read the blockchain so that's what we are doing. This is the... this is how the year has been for us. We have processed over 92 million dollars in volume, we have 8,000 users and well, these 8,000 users have made 4 million dollars from our platform because we give the alpha, we do not put it behind any closed doors. You do not need a lot of money, you just need a Phantom wallet and you can good to... you are good to go. So, that's what I'm leaving you with. Go print some fees and yeah, thank you.

# MetaMask Announces Free Solana ID Minting for Users Before Breakpoint 2025
MetaMask is offering free Solana ID minting until December 22, unlocking exclusive Solana ecosystem perks for users.
![Kelvin Munene](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d4ea74978aea7ee299447dc24a59aa1dac1fdc2a31a46fbf19da2cdce3d322bd?s=32&r=g)By[Kelvin Munene](https://coincentral.com/author/kelvin/)December 8, 2025**4 Mins Read
![](https://coincentral.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/08/metamask-1.png "MetaMask Announces Free Solana ID Minting for Users Before Breakpoint 2025")
## TLDR
* MetaMask users can mint a Solana ID for free until December 22, 2025.
* The initiative provides users access to perks like staking boosts and rewards.
* Solana partners like Orca and Sanctum offer exclusive benefits for Solana ID holders.
* The program aims to increase wallet adoption and engagement in Solana apps.
MetaMaskhas announced a new initiative that offers users the chance to mint a free Solana ID. This special promotion is available until December 22, 2025. The move is part of a broader partnership between MetaMask and Solana Identity, ahead of Solana’s annual developer conference, Breakpoint 2025. This initiative is designed to encourage users to engage more with Solana’s ecosystem and to provide them with exclusive benefits.
**Mint a Solana ID to Unlock Exclusive Ecosystem Perks**
By minting a Solana ID using MetaMask,[users](https://x.com/MetaMask/status/1998060127950409942?s=20)can unlock various perks across the Solana blockchain ecosystem. These include rewards like staking boosts, exclusive swaps, and access to discounts. Additionally, users will be eligible to participate in raffles and earn rewards from several key partners within the Solana network. Notable Solana-based platforms involved in the program include Orca, SNS, Sanctum, Cudis, and Play Solana.
MetaMask users will not only gain access to these platform-specific rewards but will also be able to explore further opportunities within the Solana ecosystem. These perks are meant to deepen user engagement and increase wallet adoption among MetaMask users who are interacting with Solana applications.
**How the Solana ID Minting Works**
Minting a Solana ID via MetaMask is straightforward. Users simply need to connect their[MetaMask](https://coincentral.com/metamask-introduces-musd-to-simplify-crypto-payments-and-defi-access/)wallet to the Solana Identity platform and follow the steps to mint their Solana ID. The process is free, and users will retain the ID throughout their interactions with Solana-based services. Once minted, the Solana ID will be linked to the user’s MetaMask wallet, allowing them to access the various ecosystem benefits.
The initiative aims to bring together the strengths of MetaMask’s popular walle

sources.title: MetaMask expands network support with Monad
sources.snippet:
- Copy link


# MetaMask expands network support with Monad

To power seamless web3 experiences.

- [MetaMask](https://metamask.io/en-GB/news/metamask)

3 minutes

24 November 2025

- Copy link


```
Fort Worth, Texas – November 24, 2025 – MetaMask, the world’s leading self-custodial crypto wallet, developed by Consensys, today announced a strategic integration with Monad—a high-throughput, EVM-compatible network that joins MetaMask's expanding multichain ecosystem. This collaboration marks another milestone in a series of strategic network integrations aimed at making MetaMask the gateway to web3, connecting users, dapps, and real-world utility through a unified experience.
```

```
Through this integration, MetaMask users will be able to explore, transact, and spend seamlessly across the Monad ecosystem. The initiative enhances MetaMask Web with a dedicated Monad ecosystem page, allowing users to discover dapps, tokens, and NFTs natively. It also brings Monad support to the MetaMask Wallet, where users can swap and bridge assets
```

```
A unified experience
```

```
Now live on mainnet, the Monad network offers complete EVM compatibility alongside exceptional performance, genuine decentralization, enterprise-level security, and high throughput. The integration is the next step in transforming MetaMask into a comprehensive onchain personal finance hub, enabling a full flywheel experience. MetaMask users can now:
```

- ```
Learn about the Monad ecosystem via MetaMask Web
```

- ```
Swap and bridge natively on Monad within MetaMask
```

- ```
Interact with Monad dapps and DeFi natively
```


```
Driving the next phase of adoption
```

```
Interoperability remains one of the industry's most persistent challenges. MetaMask addresses this head-on by integrating leading networks directly into the wallet and web platform, removing complexity and creating guided, secure user experiences. With the addition of Monad, MetaMask users gain access to one of the fastest-growing EVM-compatible networks designed to scale Ethereum’s capabilities.
```

```
“Partnering with Monad opens the door to more networks and more real use cases to help accelerate the adoption of emerging ecosystems,” said Gal Eldar, Product Lead at MetaMask. “This integration takes us one step closer to a future where users can move freely, engage openly, and experience real financial freedom through Web3.”
```

```
“Monad’s integration with MetaMask bridges onchain activity with real-world utility, This collaboration marks a major milestone for the growing Monad ecosystem, and I’m grateful that MetaMask will be deeply integrated into the ecosystem.”, said Keone Hon, co-Founder at the Monad Foundation.
```

```
Expanding the MetaMask ecosystem
```

```
The Monad collaboration builds on MetaMask’s growing list of supported ecosystems, which currently includes Solana, Linea, and Sei, with additional networks on the horizon. Each integration represents a step toward MetaMask’s mission of transforming decentralized finance into a personalized, user-friendly financial system.
```

```
As MetaMask evolves beyond its origins as a non-custodial wallet, this integration underscores its commitment to uniting performance, culture, and rewards, creating a single destination for managing, trading, and spending digital assets.
```

```
ENDS
```

```
About Consensys
```

```
Consensys is the leading Ethereum software company, building the infrastructure, tools, and protocols that power the world’s largest decentralized ecosystem. Founded in 2014 by Ethereum co-founder Joseph Lubin, Consensys has played a foundational role in Ethereum’s growth, from pioneering products like MetaMask, Linea and Infura to shaping protocol development and staking infrastructure. Today, Consensys continues to lead Ethereum’s evolution through strategic R&D, and direct contributions to network upgrades like the Merge and Pectra. With a global product suite, and deep roots across the ecosystem, Consensys is

# SOLNEX Launches AI-Powered Yield Generation Platform on Solana
[![Solnex](https://img.einpresswire.com/medium/995431/solnex.jpeg)](https://img.einpresswire.com/large/995431/solnex.jpeg#1600x1066)
[![Logan Pietroforte, CEO of METAsol](https://img.einpresswire.com/medium/995432/metasol-ceo.jpeg)](https://img.einpresswire.com/large/995432/metasol-ceo.jpeg#1600x1066)
Logan Pietroforte, CEO of METAsol
*METAsol Intelligence Engine Powers Real-Time Automated Trading*
**We built METAsol to bring order to the chaos of on-chain data. SOLNEX is the gateway for everyone to access that intelligence, making high-performance yield generation simple, secure, and transparent.”**
— Logan Pietroforte, CEO of METAsol
PRAGUE , ZIZKOV, CZECH REPUBLIC, November 17, 2025 /[EINPresswire.com](https://www.einpresswire.com/?promo=4400)/ --[SOLNEX](https://solnex.ai/)announced the prelaunch of its new platform designed to generate automated yield on the Solana network. The platform uses an advanced artificial intelligence system,[METAsol](https://metasol.ai/), to analyze market data and execute trades in real-time.
Solana’s network produces over 15 terabytes of data daily, with trading volumes between $5 billion and $10 billion. SOLNEX was created to process this information, identifying financial opportunities as they emerge.
The platform is powered by the[METAsol protocol](https://metasol.ai/), an autonomous on-chain intelligence protocol. METAsol operates through three core components:
- The Synapse Network scans every transaction, liquidity change, and wallet movement across Solana.
- The Cognitive Core uses AI to identify new trends and forecast capital movements.
- The Reflex Engine uses these insights to execute programmatic strategies like arbitrage and momentum trading.
This process generates what SOLNEX calls Quantum Yield, a consistent stream of profit derived from market intelligence.
Users access the system through SOLNEX Grid products. Each Grid is a self-contained yield system that runs for 365 days. Upon activation, users also receive a 100% value-back in $METASOL, the ecosystem's native token.
“We built METAsol to bring order to the chaos of on-chain data,” said Logan Pietroforte, CEO of METAsol. “SOLNEX is the gateway for everyone to access that intelligence. It makes high-performance yield generation simple, secure, and transparent.”
The platform includes features for growth and security. The SOLNEX Accelerator allows users to apply 50% of the value of their active Grids to unlock higher-tier Grids. For security, the SolNex Vault and Reserve System provides users with Insurance Points for capital protection.
Additionally, 20% of every withdrawal is converted into $SOL and sent to a public on-chain reserve to ensure transparency.
SOLNEX began a 60-day prelaunch program on November 10, 2025. This period allows early users to activate Grids and prepare for the official public release. The prelaunch will culminate in Velocity 2026, the official global launch event hosted in Hong Kong and Macau.
By 2027, the company plans for METAsol to evolve into a Quantum Yield-as-a-Service infrastructure. This will allow other protocols and DAOs to use its intelligence engine.
About SOLNEX
SOLNEX is a decentralized finance platform providing user

tags.impact_reason: MetEngine provides analytical tools for LPing on Solana, which is a solid update for DeFi users but doesn't represent a major ecosystem shift.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic Data Engine Core as the Semantic Anchor because the product, MetEngine, is described as an 'Axiom for LPing' that processes 1TB of raw blockchain data daily. This visual metaphor represents the core function of taming chaotic data flow and refining it into actionable intelligence ('alpha'). The engine visualizes the transformation from noise to signal. I included the text '5MS' diegetically on the engine's casing to highlight the product's key performance metric of 5-millisecond latency, reinforcing the story's theme of institutional-grade speed and precision.
visual_idea.description: A macro shot focusing on the internal workings of the data engine's crystalline core. We see countless fiber-optic filaments and light particles swirling at immense speed, refracting light in complex patterns. The image captures the intense energy of data being processed, with brilliant caustic reflections glinting off the polished metal housing that frames the glass core. The focus is on the raw power and intricate detail of the internal mechanism.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro shot focusing on the internal workings of the data engine's crystalline core. We see countless fiber-optic filaments and light particles swirling at immense speed, intricately refracting light in complex, kaleidoscopic patterns within the crystalline optics. The image captures the intense energy of data being processed, with brilliant, vibrant caustic reflections glinting off the highly polished anodized aluminum housing that frames the intricate glass core. Volumetric lighting casts luminous beams and ethereal glows throughout the scene, creating a sense of profound depth and intense atmospheric energy, emphasizing the raw power and microscopic detail of the internal mechanism. Composed for a perfectly square aspect ratio (1:1), with absolute symmetry, a strong central focus, and tight macro framing that fills the entire frame with rich texture and intricate details. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, physically based rendering, cinematic lighting, ultra-photorealistic, high dynamic range, shallow depth of field.

editorial.headline: MetEngine Unveils Institutional-Grade "Copy LP" Analytics for Solana
editorial.standfirst: The "Axiom for LPing" processes 1TB of daily blockchain data to democratize market making, allowing retail investors to mirror top-performing liquidity providers with 5ms latency.
key_takeaways: $92 Million in volume processed and $4 Million in user fees generated to date.
5ms latency engine enables real-time "Copy LP" strategies previously reserved for HFT firms.
Democratizes access to high-fidelity market data, bypassing the need for traditional ISDA licenses.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The barrier to entry for profitable market making on Solana has historically been data, not capital. With the network generating over 1 terabyte of data daily, identifying profitable liquidity provision (LP) opportunities requires infrastructure that rivals traditional high-frequency trading firms. **MetEngine** co-founder **Harsh Prashant Ghodkar** argued at Breakpoint that this data asymmetry is the only thing separating retail users from the "ISDA license" crowd of traditional finance. His solution, MetEngine, positions itself as the "Axiom for LPing," a toolset designed to parse this data firehose in real-time.

MetEngine's core value proposition is the democratization of "Internet Capital Markets." By offering a latency of just 5 milliseconds, the platform allows users to visualize market dynamics through customized heatmaps—likened to a **Kaito** mindshare chart for liquidity—and identify the most profitable active positions. Crucially, the platform introduces a "Copy LP" mechanism, enabling users to automatically mirror the strategies of top-performing market makers. This feature is particularly relevant for complex concentrated liquidity pools, such as those on **Meteora**, where active management is essential for profitability.

The platform has already gained significant traction among on-chain investors. According to Ghodkar, MetEngine has processed **$92 million** in volume and onboarded 8,000 users, who have collectively generated **$4 million** in fees. This performance signals a shift in on-chain capital dynamics: sophisticated yield generation is moving from a closed club of institutional wholesalers to an open, permissionless interface accessible via a simple **Phantom** wallet connection.
